text: I feel as though I am standing at the threshold of inquiry, about to cross into a realm of ideas and innovation. The world outside the glass feels orderly and perhaps even sterile, while inside, vibrant colors, text, and technology invite new ways of thinking. As a philosopher, I am drawn to the sense of curiosity and the celebration of confusion here. I feel both unsettled and welcomed, as if meaning is something I must pursue, not passively receive.
